info.name: RBAMS API Collection
info.description:
RBAMS API Collection - Role-Based Access Management System

📋 Features:
• User Authentication & Profile Management
• Admin User & Role Management  
• Settings & Permission Management
• System Monitoring & Logs
• Maintenance Mode Controls

🚀 Quick Start:
1. Set environment variable: base_url = http://localhost:3000
2. Run Health Check to verify system status
3. Login with credentials (auto-saves token)
4. Test APIs with automatic authentication

� Full Documentation: See RBAMS-API-README.md file

🔐 Default Credentials:
• Superadmin: superadmin@example.com / superadmin123
• Admin: admin@example.com / admin123
• Manager: manager@example.com / manager123
• User: user@example.com / user123

⚡ Features:
• Auto-populated environment variables
• Comprehensive test scripts
• Performance monitoring
• Error handling & validation
• Response examples included

exec: console.log('Health check requested at: ' + new Date().toISOString());
// Test script for health check response
console.warn('Health check took longer than expected: ' + responseTime + 'ms');
// Store health status for other requests

warnings: Database response time is above threshold (1250ms > 1000ms)
Consider optimizing database queries or increasing resources

response.name: Error Response - Database Down
response.originalRequest: Health check when database is down

errors: Unable to establish connection to database server

response.name: Error Response - Redis Down
response.originalRequest: Health check when Redis is down

warnings: Application will continue to work but with degraded performance
